related_figures.relevance: Demonstrates the three-population fitting algorithm that simultaneously detects proton beams, proton cores, and alpha particles in Faraday cup data, unlocking 20+ years of Wind data for beam studies

paper.title: A Comparison of Alpha Particle and Proton Beam Differential Flows in Collisionally Young Solar Wind

meta_description: A three-population fit to Wind Faraday cup spectra resolves the proton beam, proton core, and alpha particle simultaneously, unlocking 20+ years of beam observations. Beam differential flow remains unaffected by Coulomb friction in more collisional solar wind than alpha particles, suggesting there is a difference in how wave-particle and collisional processes impact both species.
